recommendations.title: The Legend of Tarzan
recommendations.overview: Tarzan, having acclimated to life in London, is called back to his former home in the jungle to investigate the activities at a mining encampment.

recommendations.title: Pain Hustlers
recommendations.overview: After losing her job, a single mom falls into a lucrative but ultimately dangerous scheme selling prescription drugs.

recommendations.title: Black Clover: Sword of the Wizard King
recommendations.overview: As a lionhearted boy who can't wield magic strives for the title of Wizard King, four banished Wizard Kings of yore return to crush the Clover Kingdom.
